top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND t.Time >= '08:00' 
  AND t.Time < '09:00' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND t.Time >= '08:00' 
  AND t.Time < '09:00' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND t.Time BETWEEN '08:00' AND '08:59:59' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND t.Time >= '08:00' 
  AND t.Time < '09:00' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
INNER JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND strftime('%H', t.Time) = '08' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND t.Time BETWEEN '08:00' AND '08:59:59' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND t.Time >= '08:00' 
  AND t.Time < '09:00' 
  AND g.Country = 'CZE';
